---
title: "Animal2Human Map"
logo: stride_lab_logo_transparent.png
server: shiny
favicon: favicon.ico
format: 
  dashboard:
    scrolling: true 
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/Ineichen-Group/NeuroTrialomics-Dashboard
---

```{python}
#| context: setup
import math
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from shiny import render, reactive, ui
from shinywidgets import render_widget  
import re
import ast
import plotly.express as px
from matplotlib.ticker import PercentFormatter

import pyarrow.dataset as ds
import pyarrow.compute as pc
import pyarrow as pa

```

```{python}
#| title: Filter Options
#| expandable: false

path_linked_parq = "condition_clinical_and_preclinical_15250.parquet"
path_clin_parq   = "clinical_metadata_mapped.parquet"
path_pre_parq    = "preclinical_metadata_mapped_annotated_20250723_norm_strain_country.parquet"

# Keep data as Arrow Datasets (lazy, column-pruned IO, fast filtering)
mapped_ds = ds.dataset(path_linked_parq, format="parquet")
clin_ds   = ds.dataset(path_clin_parq,   format="parquet")
pre_ds    = ds.dataset(path_pre_parq,    format="parquet")

# ---- Build option lists in Arrow (no pandas round-trip) -------------------

# Pull only needed columns as a small Arrow Table
sel_tbl = mapped_ds.to_table(columns=["disease", "drug"])

# disease options
disease_arr = sel_tbl["disease"]
disease_arr = pc.drop_null(disease_arr)                          # remove nulls
disease_vals = pc.unique(disease_arr).to_pylist()                # distinct
all_diseases = sorted(disease_vals)                              # sort in Python
disease_options = ["Show All (C)"] + all_diseases

# drug options
drug_arr = sel_tbl["drug"]
drug_arr = pc.drop_null(drug_arr)
drug_vals = pc.unique(drug_arr).to_pylist()
all_drugs = sorted(drug_vals)
drug_options = ["Show All (P)"] + all_drugs

```

```{python}
def category_bar_chart(df, category_col, title, top_n=30):
    counts = df[category_col].value_counts().nlargest(top_n).reset_index()
    counts.columns = [category_col, "Document Count"]
    counts[category_col] = pd.Categorical(counts[category_col], categories=counts[category_col], ordered=True)

    max_count = counts["Document Count"].max()
    padded_max = max_count * 1.3  # 10% padding

    fig = px.bar(
        counts,
        x="Document Count",
        y=category_col,
        orientation="h",
        text="Document Count",
        title=title,
        template="plotly_white",
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe
    )

    fig.update_layout(
        xaxis_title="Document Count",
        yaxis_title=category_col.replace("_", " ").title(),
        height=600,
        yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"),
        xaxis_range=[0, padded_max]
    )
    fig.update_traces(textposition="outside", textfont_size=11)
    return fig

```

## {.sidebar}
```{python}
ui.input_select("disease_name", "Select Disease", choices=disease_options, selected='Show All (Dis)')
ui.input_select("drug_name", "Select Drug", choices=drug_options, selected='Show All (Drug)')
ui.input_radio_buttons(
    "exclude_no_fulltext",
    "Exclude articles with no full text?",
    choices=["Yes", "No"],
    selected="No"
)
```

```{python}
@reactive.calc
def filtered_documents():
    disease = input.disease_name()
    drug = input.drug_name()
    exclude_fulltext = input.exclude_no_fulltext()  # "Yes" or "No"

    # Read only needed columns from the mapped dataset
    mapped_tbl = mapped_ds.to_table(columns=["disease", "drug", "clinical_doc_ids", "preclinical_doc_ids", "clinical_count", "preclinical_count", "max_phase"])

    # ---- Build Arrow masks (case-insensitive) -----------------------------
    masks = []

    if disease and disease != "Show All (C)":
        # substring match on disease (case-insensitive)
        disease_col_lower = pc.utf8_lower(mapped_tbl["disease"])
        masks.append(pc.match_substring(disease_col_lower, disease.lower()))

    if drug and drug != "Show All (P)":
        # exact match on drug (case-insensitive)
        drug_col_lower = pc.utf8_lower(mapped_tbl["drug"])
        masks.append(pc.equal(drug_col_lower, drug.lower()))

    if masks:
        mask = masks[0]
        for m in masks[1:]:
            mask = pc.and_(mask, m)
        mapped_tbl = mapped_tbl.filter(mask)

    # ---- Collect unique IDs from list columns -----------------------------
    # NCTIDs
    if "clinical_doc_ids" in mapped_tbl.column_names:
        nctids_arr = pc.list_flatten(mapped_tbl["clinical_doc_ids"])
        nctids = pc.unique(nctids_arr).to_pylist()
    else:
        nctids = []

    # PMIDs
    if "preclinical_doc_ids" in mapped_tbl.column_names:
        pmids_arr = pc.list_flatten(mapped_tbl["preclinical_doc_ids"])
        pmids = pc.unique(pmids_arr).to_pylist()
    else:
        pmids = []

    # ---- Filter clinical/preclinical tables by IDs ------------------------
    # Clinical
    clin_tbl = clin_ds.to_table()  # column-prune if you like
    if nctids:
        clin_mask = pc.is_in(clin_tbl["nct_id"], value_set=pa.array(nctids))
        clin_tbl = clin_tbl.filter(clin_mask)
    else:
        clin_tbl = clin_tbl.slice(0, 0)  # empty table

    # Preclinical
    pre_tbl = pre_ds.to_table()
    if pmids:
        pre_mask = pc.is_in(pre_tbl["PMID"], value_set=pa.array(pmids))
        pre_tbl = pre_tbl.filter(pre_mask)
    else:
        pre_tbl = pre_tbl.slice(0, 0)

    # Optional post-filter in pandas (for trim/normalize convenience)
    pre_df = pre_tbl.to_pandas()
    if exclude_fulltext == "Yes" and "animal_strain" in pre_df.columns:
        pre_df = pre_df[pre_df["animal_strain"].fillna("").str.strip().str.lower() != "no full text"]

    # Return pandas only at the edge for UI
    return mapped_tbl.to_pandas(), clin_tbl.to_pandas(), pre_df
```

# Mapped Studies

## Row {height=120px}

```{python}
#| id: articles-box
@render.plot
def clinical_text():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    num_articles = len(set(clinical_df['nct_id']))
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(3, 1))
    ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"{num_articles} Clinical", fontsize=16, ha='center', va='center')
    ax.axis('off')
    return fig
```

```{python}
#| id: count-preclinical-box
@render.plot
def preclinical_text():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    num_articles = len(set(preclinical_df['PMID']))
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(3, 1))
    ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"{num_articles} Preclinical", fontsize=16, ha='center', va='center')
    ax.axis('off')
    return fig
```

```{python}
#| id: diseases-box
@render.plot
def diseases_text():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    num_articles = len(set(filtered_df['disease']))
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(3, 1))
    ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"{num_articles} Diseases", fontsize=16, ha='center', va='center')
    ax.axis('off')
    return fig
```

```{python}
#| id: drugs-box
@render.plot
def drugs_text():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    num_articles = len(set(filtered_df['drug']))
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(3, 1))
    ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"{num_articles} Drugs", fontsize=16, ha='center', va='center')
    ax.axis('off')
    return fig
```

## Row {height=40%}

### Column {.tabset}

```{python}
#| title: Filtered data

@render.data_frame
def datagrid():
    filtered_df, _, _ = filtered_documents()
    df_to_show = filtered_df[['disease', 'drug', 'clinical_count','preclinical_count','max_phase']]

    return render.DataGrid(
        df_to_show,
        width="100%",
        filters=True,
    )
```

## Row

### Column
```{python}
@render_widget
def drug_bar_chart():
    filtered_df, _, _ = filtered_documents()

    # Group and summarize
    drug_counts = filtered_df.groupby("drug")[["preclinical_count", "clinical_count"]].sum()
    drug_counts["total_count"] = drug_counts["preclinical_count"] + drug_counts["clinical_count"]
    drug_counts = drug_counts.sort_values("total_count", ascending=False).head(30)
    drug_counts = drug_counts.reset_index()

    # Melt for grouped bar
    melted = drug_counts.melt(
        id_vars="drug", 
        value_vars=["preclinical_count", "clinical_count"],
        var_name="Study Type", 
        value_name="Count"
    )

    # Ensure the y-axis (drug) is ordered by total count (most frequent on top)
    melted["drug"] = pd.Categorical(
        melted["drug"],
        categories=drug_counts["drug"],
        ordered=True
    )

    fig = px.bar(
        melted,
        x="Count",
        y="drug",
        color="Study Type",
        orientation="h",
        text="Count",
        title="Top 30 Drugs: Preclinical vs Clinical Study Counts",
        template="plotly_white",
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe
    )

    fig.update_layout(
        yaxis_title="Drug",
        xaxis_title="Study Count",
        height=800,
        barmode="group",
        legend_title="Study Type",
        yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed")  # 🔁 Most frequent on top
    )

    fig.update_traces(textposition="outside", textfont_size=11)

    return fig
```
### Column

```{python}
@render_widget
def study_over_time_chart():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    # Count studies by year
    preclinical_by_year = preclinical_df["year"].value_counts().sort_index().astype(int)
    clinical_by_year = clinical_df["start_year"].value_counts().sort_index().astype(int)

    # Combine and align years
    study_counts = pd.DataFrame({
        "Preclinical": preclinical_by_year,
        "Clinical": clinical_by_year
    }).fillna(0).astype(int).sort_index()
    study_counts.index = study_counts.index.astype(int)

    # Reset index for Plotly
    study_counts = study_counts.reset_index().rename(columns={"index": "Year"})

    fig = px.bar(
        study_counts,
        x="Year",
        y=["Preclinical", "Clinical"],
        barmode="group",
        text_auto=True,
        title="Number of Preclinical vs Clinical Studies Over Time",
        template="plotly_white",
        labels={"value": "Number of Studies", "variable": "Study Type"},
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe
    )

    fig.update_layout(
        xaxis_title="Year",
        yaxis_title="Study Count",
        legend_title="Study Type",
        height=600
    )

    return fig
```

```{python}
def preprocess_multilabel_columns(df, condition_col="disease", drug_col="drug", sep="|"):
    """
    Split and explode multi-label columns (e.g., pipe-separated conditions or drugs).

    Args:
        df (pd.DataFrame): Original DataFrame.
        condition_col (str): Name of the disease/condition column.
        drug_col (str): Name of the drug column.
        sep (str): Delimiter separating labels (default: '|').

    Returns:
        pd.DataFrame: Expanded DataFrame with one label per row.
    """
    df = df.copy()

    # Split and explode conditions
    df[condition_col] = df[condition_col].fillna("").astype(str).str.split(sep)
    df = df.explode(condition_col, ignore_index=True)
    df[condition_col] = df[condition_col].str.strip()
    df = df[df[condition_col] != ""]

    # Split and explode drugs
    df[drug_col] = df[drug_col].fillna("").astype(str).str.split(sep)
    df = df.explode(drug_col, ignore_index=True)
    df[drug_col] = df[drug_col].str.strip()
    df = df[df[drug_col] != ""]

    return df

```

```{python}
def plot_top_entity_bar_plotly(
    df,
    id_column: str,
    entity_column: str,
    title_label: str = "Entity",
    top_n: int = 20,
    color: str = "#E69F00"
):
    """
    Create an interactive horizontal bar chart of top entities (e.g., conditions or drugs)
    using Plotly Express.

    Args:
        df (pd.DataFrame): Input DataFrame with one row per annotation.
        id_column (str): Column representing unique IDs (e.g., PMID).
        entity_column (str): Column containing the entity to count (e.g., drug, disease).
        title_label (str): Human-readable label for chart title.
        top_n (int): Number of top entities to display.
        color (str): Bar color (hex code or named color).
    """
    df_filtered = df[df[entity_column].notna() & (df[entity_column] != '')]

    entity_counts = (
        df_filtered.groupby(entity_column)[id_column]
        .nunique()
        .reset_index(name="Count")
        .sort_values(by="Count", ascending=False)
        .head(top_n)
    )
    max_count = entity_counts["Count"].max()
    padded_max = max_count * 1.15  # 10% padding

    fig = px.bar(
        entity_counts,
        x="Count",
        y=entity_column,
        orientation="h",
        template="plotly_white",
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe,
        text="Count"
        
    )

    fig.update_traces(textposition='outside')
    fig.update_layout(
        title=f"Top {top_n} {title_label}s by Unique {id_column}",
        xaxis_title="Number of Studies",
        yaxis_title=title_label,
        yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"),  # Horizontal bars top-to-bottom
        font=dict(size=14),
        margin=dict(l=80, r=20, t=60, b=40),
        xaxis_range=[0, padded_max]
    )

    return fig
```

```{python}

def _prep_exploded(df: pd.DataFrame, col: str, max_label_length: int | None):
    x = df.copy()
    x[col] = x[col].fillna('').astype(str).str.split(',')
    x = x.explode(col)
    x[col] = x[col].astype(str).str.strip()
    x = x[x[col] != '']
    if max_label_length and max_label_length > 0:
        x[col] = x[col].apply(lambda s: (s[:max_label_length] + "…") if len(s) > max_label_length else s)
    return x

def _top_values_by_unique_pmids(exploded: pd.DataFrame, col: str, top_n: int):
    return (
        exploded.groupby(col)['PMID'].nunique()
        .sort_values(ascending=False)
        .head(top_n)
    )
    
def plot_prevalence_over_time_plotly(
    df: pd.DataFrame,
    column_with_comma_values: str,
    top_n: int = 10,
    max_label_length: int = 15,
    include_rest: bool = False,
    min_yearly_papers: int = 10,
):
    """Prevalence (share of papers per year) for Top-N values — Plotly version."""
    col = column_with_comma_values
    exploded = _prep_exploded(df, col, max_label_length)

    # Top-N selection and yearly totals
    top_counts = _top_values_by_unique_pmids(exploded, col, top_n)
    top_values = top_counts.index.tolist()
    yearly_totals = exploded.groupby('year')['PMID'].nunique().sort_index()
    valid_years = yearly_totals[yearly_totals >= min_yearly_papers].index

    # Yearly counts for Top-N (keep Top-N order)
    top_yearly = (
        exploded[exploded[col].isin(top_values) & exploded['year'].isin(valid_years)]
        .groupby(['year', col])['PMID'].nunique()
        .unstack(fill_value=0)
        .reindex(valid_years, fill_value=0)
        .reindex(columns=top_values, fill_value=0)
    )

    # Optional "Rest"
    if include_rest:
        any_top = (
            exploded[exploded[col].isin(top_values) & exploded['year'].isin(valid_years)]
            .groupby(['year', 'PMID']).size().reset_index(name='n')
            .groupby('year')['PMID'].nunique()
            .reindex(valid_years, fill_value=0)
        )
        rest_counts = (yearly_totals.reindex(valid_years) - any_top).clip(lower=0)
        top_yearly['Rest'] = rest_counts

    # Prevalence
    denom = yearly_totals.reindex(valid_years).replace(0, pd.NA)
    with pd.option_context('mode.use_inf_as_na', True):
        prevalence = top_yearly.div(denom, axis=0).fillna(0)

    # Long form for Plotly
    if prevalence.empty:
        # Return an empty-but-styled figure
        fig = px.line(template="plotly_white")
        fig.update_layout(
            title=f"Prevalence Over Time (years with ≥{min_yearly_papers} papers)",
            xaxis_title="", yaxis_title="",
            yaxis=dict(range=[0, 1], tickformat=".0%"), legend_title=col
        )
        return fig

    df_long = prevalence.reset_index().melt(
        id_vars="year", var_name=col, value_name="share"
    )

    # Keep legend order as Top-N (+ Rest at end if present)
    category_order = top_values + (["Rest"] if include_rest else [])
    if category_order:
        df_long[col] = pd.Categorical(df_long[col], categories=category_order, ordered=True)

    fig = px.line(
        df_long,
        x="year",
        y="share",
        color=col,
        template="plotly_white",
    )
    fig.update_layout(
        title=f"Prevalence Over Time (years with ≥{min_yearly_papers} papers)",
        xaxis_title="",
        yaxis_title="",
        legend_title=col,
        margin=dict(l=40, r=20, t=60, b=40),
    )
    fig.update_yaxes(range=[0, 1], tickformat=".0%")

    return fig
```

# Preclinical

```{python}
#| title: Preclinical
@render.data_frame
def datagrid_preclinical():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    to_show = preclinical_df[['PMID','title','journal_name','year','publication_type','linkbert_mapped_conditions','disease','linkbert_mapped_drugs','drug','animal_species', 'animal_sex', 'animal_strain', 'animal_number','animal_age','animal_age_class', 'assay_type','rigor_blinding','rigor_randomization','rigor_welfare']]
    return render.DataGrid(
        to_show,
        width="100%",
        filters=True,
    )
```

## Row
```{python}
#| title: Disease
@render_widget

def plot_disease_number():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  preclinical_df_flat = preprocess_multilabel_columns(preclinical_df)
  
  return plot_top_entity_bar_plotly(
    df=preclinical_df_flat,
    id_column="PMID",
    entity_column="disease",
    title_label="Condition")

```

```{python}
#| title: Drug
@render_widget

def plot_drug_number():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  preclinical_df_flat = preprocess_multilabel_columns(preclinical_df)
  
  return plot_top_entity_bar_plotly(
    df=preclinical_df_flat,
    id_column="PMID",
    entity_column="drug",
    title_label="Drug")

```


## Row
```{python}
#| title: Article First Author Country
@render_widget

def plot_first_author_country():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()

  return plot_top_entity_bar_plotly(preclinical_df, id_column="PMID", entity_column="first_author_country", title_label="First Author Country")

```

```{python}
#| title: First Author Country Over Time
@render_widget

def plot_first_author_country_over_time():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()

  return plot_prevalence_over_time_plotly(
        preclinical_df, "first_author_country", include_rest=False
    )

```

## Row

```{python}
#| title: Animal Species
@render_widget

def plot_animal_species():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "animal_species", "Document Count by Animal Species")

```

```{python}
#| title: Animal Species Trend
@render_widget

def plot_animal_species_trend():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return plot_prevalence_over_time_plotly(preclinical_df, "animal_species")

```

## Row

```{python}
#| title: Animal Strain
@render_widget

def plot_animal_strain():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "animal_strain_norm_family", "Document Count by Animal Strain")

```

```{python}
#| title: Animal Strain Trend
@render_widget

def plot_animal_strain_trend():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return plot_prevalence_over_time_plotly(preclinical_df, "animal_strain_norm_family")

```

## Row

```{python}
#| title: Animal Sex
@render_widget

def plot_animal_sex():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "animal_sex", "Document Count by Animal Sex")

```

```{python}
#| title: Animal Sex Trend
@render_widget

def plot_animal_sex_trend():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return plot_prevalence_over_time_plotly(preclinical_df, "animal_sex")

```

## Row

```{python}
#| title: Assay (Outcome)
@render_widget

def plot_assay_evaluated():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "assay_type", "Document Count by Assay Type")

```

```{python}
#| title: Assay (Outcome) Trend
@render_widget

def plot_assay_evaluated_trend():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return plot_prevalence_over_time_plotly(preclinical_df, "assay_type")

```

## Row

### Column
```{python}
#| title: Welfare
@render_widget

def plot_rigor_welfare():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "rigor_welfare", "Document Count by Welfare Statement")

```

### Column
```{python}
#| title: Masking
@render_widget

def plot_rigor_blinding():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "rigor_blinding", "Document Count by Masking Statement")

```

### Column
```{python}
#| title: Randomization
@render_widget

def plot_rigor_randomization():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "rigor_randomization", "Document Count by Randomization Statement")

```

## Row

### Column
```{python}
#| title: Animal Number
@render_widget

def plot_animal_number():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "animal_number", "Document Count by Animal Number")

```

### Column

```{python}
#| title: Animal Age
@render_widget

def plot_animal_age():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "animal_age", "Document Count by Animal Age")

```


# Clinical

```{python}
#| title: Clinical
@render.data_frame
def datagrid_clinical():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    to_show = clinical_df[["nct_id","study_official_title","start_date","phase","study_type","overall_status","disease","drug","Disease Class"
]]
    return render.DataGrid(
        to_show,
        width="100%",
        filters=True,
    )
```

## Row

### Column {height=50%}

```{python}
@render_widget  
def phase_bar_chart():  
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()

    phase_order = [
        'Early Phase 1',
        'Phase 1',
        'Phase 1/2',
        'Phase 2',
        'Phase 2/3',
        'Phase 3',
        'Phase 4',
        'Not Applicable'
    ]
        # Count the occurrences of each phase
    phase_counts = clinical_df['phase'].value_counts().reindex(phase_order, fill_value=0).reset_index()
    phase_counts.columns = ['phase', 'count']
    
    # Create the bar chart with counts displayed on top of the bars
    bar_chart = px.bar(
        phase_counts, 
        x='phase', 
        y='count',
        title="Distribution of Phases",
        template="plotly_white",
        category_orders={'phase': phase_order},
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe,  # Set a more vibrant color scale
        text='count'  # Display counts on top of the bars
    )
    bar_chart.update_traces(textposition='outside', textfont_size=12)

    return bar_chart 
```

### Column {height=50%}


```{python}
@render_widget
def status_bar_chart():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()

    # Count the occurrences of each overall status
    status_counts = clinical_df['overall_status'].value_counts().reset_index()
    status_counts.columns = ['overall_status', 'count']
    status_counts = status_counts.sort_values(by='count', ascending=True)

    # Create the bar chart with the correct x and y axes
    bar_chart = px.bar(
        status_counts, 
        x='count', 
        y='overall_status',  # Correctly specify the y-axis as the count
        title="Distribution of Overall Status",
        template="plotly_white",
        text='count',  # Display counts on top of the bars
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe,
        orientation='h'
    )

    bar_chart.update_traces(textposition='outside', textfont_size=12)
    
    return bar_chart
```
